description: secretx/src/lib.rs umbrella crate tests verify env and file dispatch but not mem, even though mem is also a default feature with both BackendRegistration and WritableBackendRegistration. Three gaps: (1) inventory_backend_registrations_include_defaults (line 355) asserts env and file are present but not mem; (2) inventory_writable_registrations_include_file (line 370) asserts file is present but not mem; (3) no from_uri_mem_dispatches_correctly or from_uri_writable_mem_dispatches_correctly tests exist, unlike env (line 217) and file (lines 223, 317). All three default backends should have parity in the umbrella test suite.
title: Umbrella tests missing mem dispatch and inventory assertions
